Kansas Senate President Ty Masterson Announces 2026 Gubernatorial Bid | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ty Masterson, Republican President of the Kansas Senate, announced his candidacy for the 2026 Kansas gubernatorial election on Sunday, April 19, 2026, entering a crowded Republican primary field that includes Jeff Colyer, Vicki Schmidt, and others.[3][2]
